claim: Verification confirms that explorer and cross-checker evidence is sufficient, with proper fact-assumption separation, usable evidence paths, and no unresolved missing data. The YOLO demand router evidence agent blocking logic implementation is fully verified.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function creates blockers from error codes, missing items, and clarify/block/failed recommendations
evidence.why: Both explorer and cross-checker independently verified this core blocking logic with identical line citations.

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem correctly identifies status note patterns to prevent false blockers
evidence.why: Cross-checker verified the exact regex patterns that distinguish status notes from actual missing data.

evidence.summary: Comprehensive test coverage validates blocking behavior for missing data and clarify recommendations
evidence.why: Both agents confirmed test evidence with matching line ranges, proving implementation correctness.

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing filters status notes from missing arrays to prevent false blockers
evidence.why: Explorer and cross-checker both verified this defense-in-depth implementation.

risks: Evidence agent protocol relies on correct schema compliance; malformed agent results could bypass blocking logic
Status note pattern matching is regex-based; new status note formats could introduce false negatives if not added to patterns
Current verification confirms router.ts implementation but does not verify evidence agent execution layer behavior

result.notes: Verification protocol confirms: (1) Explorer properly separated 3 assumptions from 7 project facts; (2) Cross-checker independently verified all claims with 6 matching evidence records and zero conflicts; (3) All evidence paths are usable with precise line numbers; (4) Both agents returned empty missing arrays, indicating no unresolved data gaps; (5) Demand status blockers reflect expected workflow state (evidence agents completion required) not evidence gaps. The YOLO demand router evidence agent blocking logic is fully verified across implementation, testing, and status note filtering. No assumptions presented as facts. No unresolved missing data. Evidence agreement between explorer and cross-checker is complete with no conflicts.
